programme.desc: Jethalal is shocked to see Sundar. Later, the members are unsure about who has decorated the society premises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After much drama and deliberation over Champaklal's disappearance, the truth is revealed. Everyone is shocked to see Ajay Devgn and Sonakshi Sinha enter the premises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bollywood actors Ajay Devgn and Sonakshi Sinha join the Gokuldham members to mark a milestone in their journey.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When two murders take place due to food poisoning, the suspicion is on the 'dabbawala' who have been delivering food to them. On investigating, Team CID believe someone else is behind the poisoning.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Team CID travels to Manali to investigate the murder of a girl who is found buried in snow. She was staying at a hotel with a man and seems to have been strangulated to death.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide requests Jethalal to deposit a maintenance cheque on time. Meanwhile, Champaklal returns from his trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha comes up with a special way to boost sales at Gada Electronics. Meanwhile, Bhide and Madhavi decide to clean their house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide feels too sentimental to let some of his old belongings go. Soon, he attempts to explain his feelings to Madhavi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul reveals that garbage has been dumped outside the society office. Soon, Madhavi realises Bhide and Sodhi deceived her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal and Madhavi secretly sell all of Bhide's old belongings. Later, Bhide seeks advice from Goli.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide tries to teach Popatlal about the importance of preserving old belongings. Soon, Bhide enlists Taarak's help to get his message across.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sensing Bhide's emotional attachment to his antiquities, Madhavi offers to purchase the box from the scrap dealer. However, she is surprised to learn that Popatlal is the new owner of the box.

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala
programme.desc: Lord Vishnu speaks to Devaki and Vasudev about his plan to be born as their child. Meanwhile, Kansa's guards fall asleep and Vasudev escapes with his child.

programme.title: Super Dancer -- Chapter 5
programme.desc: The Super Dancers dazzle with humour-laced routines. Later, comedy icons Bharti, Harssh, Dr Sanket and Sugandha watch in awe as the young talents shine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal doubts his name change, but Anjali shares news of a marriage prospect. Taarak decides to stay in the house all day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak gets permission to leave work after telling his boss about Pyaarelal's single life. Pyaarelal meets his potential bride, but her family prefer his old name.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The family of a potential bride visit Pyaarelal to check up on him. Anjali proposes that both families should engage in a conversation together to strengthen their bond.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family visits Taarak while Daya asks Jethalal to go to his house as soon as possible; Taarak and his friends attend a poetry conference.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family entertains the residents of Gokuldham with great poetry; while chatting with Jethalal and his friends, Mr Sharma says that wives can never keep secrets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Mr Sharma challenges the men of Gokuldham to tell one secret to their wives and see whether they keep it or not; Jethalal asks Bagha to install security cameras in the society compound.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham initiate the challenge of seeing whether their wives can keep secrets. Dr Hathi begins by telling his wife a secret of Bhide's and asking her to not share it with anyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Daya a secret about Taarak and reminds her to not reveal it to anyone; Bhide makes Bagha install security cameras in the society clubhouse.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham gather in the clubhouse to talk about their husbands' secrets. Meanwhile, Jethalal and his friends watch them through the security cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of Gokuldham confront their wives in the clubhouse and ask them why they would reveal their secrets. They further disclose that they saw them doing this on the CCTV cameras.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya informs Jethalal that she is hosting a garba class for her friends in the clubhouse. Bawree wishes to attend a garba programme and asks Bagha to buy her tickets.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bapuji, Jethalal, and Daya want Bawri and Bagha to get married immediately, and the two are happy with the arrangement.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide fight over water in the morning. Daya keeps fasting for everyone's health, and Bapuji encourages everyone to fast with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya asks if Jethalal has planned to do anything because she is preparing a special dish, and wants him to stay in for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Ekta takes a long time to decide on the saree she wants as the female residents in Gokuldham society go out shopping for her marriage. Jethalal stops eating to ready himself for Daya's special meal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is excited to have Daya's dinner and invites Mehata to feast with him. However, when he arrives home, he learns Daya has been out shopping with the ladies.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After coming home, Daya faces her upset family. However, she feels relieved to know that they were only pretending to be mad at her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal agrees to help his uncle financially with his wife's treatment. Jethalal visits Taarak's house for a cup of tea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Craving for a cup of tea, Jethalal visits Taarak's house. However, he cannot seem to find tea anywhere.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Determined to have tea with his breakfast and willing to go to any means necessary for it, Jethalal visits Sodhi and Iyer's house, but he is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is unable to have a refreshing cup of tea with his breakfast in spite of visiting the houses of all his friends in Gokuldham Society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: In the police station, Inspector Chalu Pandey makes his team take an oath to maintain the cleanliness of the city.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham Society begin to joke about Jethalal's need for tea and gossip about his strange activities with his friends.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal looks through his things and finds his old radio, Gaanelal. He and Jethalal eventually try to switch it on and listen to it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and the kids see someone on the terrace of Gokuldham Society and get a good fright when they investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Just as the kids inform the elders of Gokuldham Society about a white ghost, Gogi gets trapped on the terrace.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of Gokuldham breathe a sigh of relief as they begin believe that their colony is no longer haunted by a ghost, but Gogi begs to differ.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's life flashes in front of his eyes when he spots a ghost in the society. His worst fears are confirmed when Tapu Sena also claim to have seen the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As more residents spot a ghost in Gokuldham, they begin to believe that their society is haunted and look for cover.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents rest easy after Champak Chacha's plan works. However, Bhide still does not give up and everyone has to come up with more reasons to stop him.

programme.desc: Hathi examines Bhide to check if he has rested well as a plan to stall him. Later, Bhide is late for his trip.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal pretends to be a thief and steals Bhide's luggage. However, Bhide and his wife still insist on going to surprise Sonu.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A bus blocks Bhide's car as Sonu makes a surprise appearance with a group of dancers. Meanwhile, Bhide realises that the residents have been working with Tapu Sena to stop him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal and Tapu help Jethalal fix the button of his shirt. Meanwhile, Bhide and Popatlal get into a fight with each other.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya asks Anjali to watch over the house her family decide to leave for Bhuj to see Magan Kaka. However, Bapuji reveals to them that Magan is actually fine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal rushes to check if Champaklal has returned but realises that he was mistaken.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is waiting for Jethalal as she is feeling romantic. However, Jethalal and his friends are looking forward to a special dance performance by European women.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Baapu Ji unexpectedly decides to visit his village for three days. After he departs for the station, Jethalal and Daya are delighted at the prospect of spending quality time together.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak and other men from Gokuldham Society decide to go for a dance show. However, they refuse to take Popatlal with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men are stunned to see their women all dressed up and ready to go out to party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide, Dr Hatthi, Jethalal, Sodhi, and Taarak try to talk their wives out of travelling alone, but they refuse to listen. Both the men and the women enjoy their parties.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The women of Gokuldham are enjoying their party. However, the men's party is cancelled when the dance troop's flight is delayed.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A group of men bother the women of Gokuldham on their way back. However, the women decide not to tell their husbands and deal with the problem themselves.

programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.desc: Popatlal gives a breakfast treat to Jethalal. Bhide learns that Tappu Sena is going on a study trip in Bengaluru.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha imagines Jethalal bald during his daydream and believes that it is a sign of good luck. Jethalal learns that he's getting an exclusive contract.

programme.desc: After Tapu and Jethalal leave, Champaklal is all alone at home and sees a ghost in the opposite building.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal decides to bring the plant that he believes can ward off the spirit from his house. Taarak feels worried about his behaviour.

programme.desc: When Popatlal decides to leave from work, he learns about the bridal ghost. He musters courage to leave from work and hails a rickshaw, but something eerie leaves him shocked.

programme.desc: After Popatlal sees the ghost as well, he rushes to inform Taarak about it. Sodhi, tired of the chaos, decides to break the lock and find the truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite being scared of the ghost, the members decide to go along with Sodhi to Mohanlal's apartment and look for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members run for their lives after they see strange objects in Mohanlal's apartment. Bhide then calls up Chalu Pandey to investigate the house.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chalu Pandey gets informed by everyone about the situation and decides to go to Mohanlal's place to see if there is something fishy and to end all the drama.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The society members discover several weird things inside Mohanlal's apartment. Bhide decides to call Chalu Pandey to investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal tells everyone about his nightmare, Sodhi gives him medicine to help him cope with his fears.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi, tired of Champaklal and Popatlal's behaviour, gives them some alcohol to calm them down. However, both get drunk and run to Mohanlal's apartment.

programme.desc: Everyone tries to find a solution for the ongoing problem in the Gokuldham Society. Champaklal unintentionally tells Jethalal the truth, making him decide to head home immediately.

programme.desc: After hearing about Popatlal's scary experience, the Gokuldham Society members devise a plan to scare off flat buyers.

programme.desc: Bhide accompanies the prospective buyers to Mohanlal's apartment. However, something strange makes all of them run for their lives.

programme.desc: The ghost tells the society members that she will not leave until she gets married. Left without an option, the members call a ghostbuster.
